hero.title: Swapnil Katiyar
hero.subtitle: Front-End Developer
hero.description: I build production UIs with Next.js and React—recently a live ONDC marketplace for Bajaj Finserv Markets (Strapi CMS, full SEO: sitemap, robots, OG) and Piramal Sales Central, where I led Config Driven Deployment to unify 8+ loan product flows and cut conditional sprawl. ~3+ years across e-commerce, e-gaming, CMS dashboards, and legacy codebases. Civil engineer turned developer; I care about performance, maintainability, and UX that survives real traffic.
hero.availability: Open to React / TypeScript frontend roles — remote or hybrid product teams
